result: If I could change the world in a single way, I would want a reality where every person has fair access to the basic necessities—good education, reliable health care, and the opportunity to pursue meaningful work—because when those fundamental needs are met, most of the other problems we face become far easier to solve.

message.content: If I could change the world in a single way, I would want a reality where every person has fair access to the basic necessities—good education, reliable health care, and the opportunity to pursue meaningful work—because when those fundamental needs are met, most of the other problems we face become far easier to solve.
